title: String Art Studio
description: Weave mathematical thread-art on a peg circle, or trace any drawing/photo into thread with a greedy string-art algorithm.
concept: A generative-art loom: pick from four peg-and-string formulas (cardioid multiplication table, star polygons, layered roses, parabola envelopes) and watch a fresh piece resolve instantly, or switch to Image Trace to draw a silhouette (or upload a photo) and let a greedy darkness-matching algorithm choose the actual thread path a real string-art crafter would use.
features: 4 mathematical string-art formulas with live parameter sliders (peg count, multiplier/skip, layering)
Image Trace mode: draw or upload a source image, greedy line-selection algorithm picks the highest-darkness peg-to-peg thread each step
4 built-in silhouette presets (heart, star, smiley, mountain) plus freehand drawpad and file upload
Weave-in animation replays the thread order progressively
Export finished pattern as PNG or true vector SVG (line elements)
Shareable link (URL hash) and named local saves reproduce the exact peg layout + thread order

interaction.mouse: Drag sliders to tune peg count / multiplier / skip; hover thread color swatches
interaction.click: Pick a pattern, preset, or Weave/Randomize/Trace/Export buttons
interaction.touch: Draw silhouettes on the drawpad; sliders and buttons are touch-friendly with a slide-in control drawer
interaction.keyboard: Standard form control navigation (Tab/Arrow keys on sliders and selects)
